context: Tests whether the SharePlay activities skill is applied for shared media playback setup.

checklist.name: Capability setup
checklist.description: Adds the Group Activities capability to the app target and references the com.apple.developer.group-session entitlement without inventing unsupported Info.plist keys.

checklist.name: Activity definition
checklist.description: Defines a GroupActivity with Codable stored data, concise GroupActivityMetadata, .watchTogether, and a fallback URL or equivalent content identifier.

checklist.name: Activation path
checklist.description: Uses GroupStateObserver.isEligibleForGroupSession to choose direct prepareForActivation/activate when eligible and GroupActivitySharingController when no conversation is active.

checklist.name: Session observation
checklist.description: Observes Activity.sessions() from a retained manager or model object rather than transient view state.

checklist.name: Join lifecycle
checklist.description: Calls session.join(), stores cancellable Task<Void, Never> handles, and cleans up on invalidation or leave.

checklist.name: AVPlayer coordination
checklist.description: Uses player.playbackCoordinator.coordinateWithSession(session) for AVPlayer rate and time synchronization.

checklist.name: Messaging boundary
checklist.description: Avoids redundant play, pause, seek, or rate messenger messages and reserves GroupSessionMessenger for app-specific state outside AVPlayer transport sync.

checklist.name: Minimal payloads
checklist.description: Keeps the activity payload to identifiers, URLs, or descriptors rather than large media data.
